failure_signature.details: Rate limit exceeded for gpt-4o: Limit 10000 tokens per min. Current usage: 9850 tokens. Please try again in 1.2s.

problem.goal_state: Complete multi-step ReAct agent loop with tool calls

solutions.solution_summary: Add exponential backoff retry logic with jitter to LLM calls
solution_steps: Install tenacity: pip install tenacity
Wrap the LLM call with @retry(wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=2, max=60), stop=stop_after_attempt(5), retry=retry_if_exception_type(RateLimitError))
Add jitter using wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=2, max=60) + wait_random(0, 2)
Configure LangChain's max_retries parameter on the ChatOpenAI instance: ChatOpenAI(model='gpt-4o', max_retries=5)
Monitor retry count in logs to detect persistent rate limiting

solutions.solution_summary: Reduce token throughput by batching requests and implementing a token budget
solution_steps: Track cumulative token usage per minute using a sliding window counter
Implement a pre-call check: if projected usage exceeds 80% of limit, sleep until the window resets
Use LangChain's callbacks to track token counts: from langchain.callbacks import get_openai_callback
Set max_tokens on each request to prevent unexpectedly large responses consuming the budget

failure_signature.details: Your organization has exceeded its monthly spending limit. Current usage: $520.00 / $500.00 limit.

problem.goal_state: Run CrewAI multi-agent research pipeline to completion

solutions.solution_summary: Increase billing quota or switch to a fallback model when primary quota is exhausted
solution_steps: Log into the Anthropic console at console.anthropic.com and increase the monthly spend limit under Organization Settings > Billing
Alternatively, implement a model fallback strategy: configure CrewAI agents with a fallback_llm parameter pointing to a cheaper model
Add a cost estimation step before long-running pipelines using tiktoken to estimate total token usage
Set per-agent token budgets in CrewAI using max_tokens_per_agent configuration

failure_signature.details: This model's maximum context length is 1048576 tokens. However, your messages resulted in 1102340 tokens. Please reduce the length of the messages.

problem.goal_state: Process large document corpus through multi-agent conversation

solutions.solution_summary: Implement conversation summarization and sliding window to manage token usage
solution_steps: Enable AutoGen's built-in conversation summarization by setting summary_method='reflection_with_llm' on the GroupChat
Set max_round and max_consecutive_auto_reply to limit unbounded conversation growth
Implement a custom message transform that summarizes older messages when total tokens exceed 80% of context window
Use AutoGen's clear_history method periodically to reset conversation state while preserving key facts in a summary message

solutions.solution_summary: Chunk the document corpus and process in parallel with map-reduce pattern
solution_steps: Split the document corpus into chunks of 500K tokens or fewer using a recursive text splitter
Create a map phase where each chunk is processed independently by a separate AutoGen agent group
Implement a reduce phase that aggregates the partial results from each chunk
Use AutoGen's async capabilities to run chunk processing in parallel for faster execution

failure_signature.details: Rate limit reached for gpt-4o in organization org-xxx on requests per min (RPM): Limit 500, Used 498, Requested 5.

problem.goal_state: Execute parallel tool calls across multiple LangChain agents

solutions.solution_summary: Implement request-level rate limiting with a shared semaphore across all agents
solution_steps: Create a shared asyncio.Semaphore with a limit below the RPM quota (e.g., asyncio.Semaphore(400) for a 500 RPM limit)
Wrap all LLM calls with the semaphore: async with semaphore: await llm.ainvoke(messages)
Add a global request counter that resets every 60 seconds using asyncio.create_task for the reset timer
If using LangGraph, configure the rate_limiter parameter on the ChatOpenAI model instance
Consider staggering agent start times by 2-5 seconds to avoid burst patterns

failure_signature.details: Resource exhausted: Quota exceeded for embedding requests per minute on models/text-embedding-004. Limit: 1500 QPM.

problem.goal_state: Build and query RAG knowledge base for CrewAI research agents

solutions.solution_summary: Batch embedding requests and cache results to minimize API calls
solution_steps: Batch documents into groups of 100 before calling the embedding API instead of sending one at a time
Implement a local embedding cache using an SQLite database keyed by content hash (SHA-256)
Before calling the embedding API, check the cache for existing embeddings of identical content
Add a rate limiter using a token bucket algorithm set to 80% of the QPM limit (1200 requests/min)
For initial bulk indexing, use the batch embedding endpoint with built-in rate management
